title: Charred Brussels Sprouts with Balsamic Honey Glaze
description: High-heat roasted Brussels sprouts with deeply charred cut sides, finished with a quick balsamic honey glaze. The char is the whole point.

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425–450°F. Use a heavy sheet pan.
Trim and halve Brussels sprouts. Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Arrange cut side down on the pan -- don't crowd them. Do not stir.
Check at the 20-minute mark. Continue roasting until cut sides are deeply charred, not just browned. Total 20–25 minutes.
Remove pan from oven. Drizzle balsamic vinegar and honey over hot sprouts and toss quickly to coat. Serve immediately.

notes:
The char is the whole point -- don't pull them early. Deeply charred cut sides are what you're after, not just golden brown.

Ratio to remember: 2:1 balsamic to honey.

Optional additions: crispy pancetta, toasted walnuts, shaved parmesan.
